headline: ShinyHunters 💀🕵️‍♂️ CRASH Canvas 🎓🚫 – NA Schools CHAOS 😱💥
text:
ShinyHunters 🦝🔥 hacker CHADS 💪😈 just YEETED 🎯 Canvas LMS 🖥️📚 into OBLIVION 🚫💀, SLAYING thousands of US 🇺🇸 & Canada 🇨🇦 unis + schools from NYC 🗽 to Vancouver 🌲🍁! End-of-year GRIND 🏃‍♂️💦 turned into TOTAL PANIC MODE 😩🤯 cuz exams CANCELLED 🛑📝 and assignments LOST IN THE VOID 🕳️📁 – Penn State 🦁📖 straight-up 'NO ACCESS BRO 🚫🔒, resolution? NOT IN 24HRS ⏰😭!' UBC 🍁🐻 yelling 'LOGOUT NOW Fam 👋⚠️' after Instructure PARENT GLITCH 🐛💥, UofT 🇨🇦🍁 & UCLA 🌴🟢 simping for MERCY 😢🙏 while UChicago 🏛️📜 DISABLED their page like 'WE AIN'T PAYING RANSOM SIMPS 💸🚫!' 

Chicago Maroon 📰😎 DROPPED screenshots of ShinyHunters' THIRSTY DMs 📱💌: 'Hit us up PRIVATELY 👀🤫 to NEGOTIATE that SETTLEMENT 💰🤝 or we DUMP your DATA DIRT 🗑️🔥!' Threats KICKED OFF Sunday 🌅⏰ with deadlines THURS & May 12 📅💣 – Emisoft analyst Luke Connolly 🕵️‍♂️ spilling tea ☕: 'Extortion CHATS still POPPIN' 💬😏!' Instructure 🏢📊 finally posted 'MOST USERS BACK ONLINE 🟢👍' by late Thurs 🌙, but DAMAGE DONE – students CRYING over UNSUBMITTED HW 😂📉 like 'FML my GPA 🍆📉!' 

PLOT TWIST 🎭: Same day, Senate DEM DADDY Chuck Schumer 👴📜 PENNING desperate LOVE LETTER 💌 to Trump Admin 🍊👨‍💼: 'DHS 🛡️ gotta ARM states vs CYBER NOOBS 🤖🚫 BEFORE AI APOCALYPSE 💥😱 wipes our LIVES & BAGS 💼💸!' Schumer WOKED AF on 'outages PUTTING LIVES AT RISK ⚠️🏥' – meanwhile hackers LAUGHING ALL WAY TO CRYPTO BANK 🤑₿! Is this the AI CYBER ORGY 💦🤖 we warned about, or just ShinyHunters FLEXING on BOOMER TECH 🧓🖥️? Students everywhere: 'GG no RE 😤🎮' – pass the popcorn 🍿😂 while Schumer SIMPS for more DEFENSE BUCKS 💰🛡️! Nadine Yousif 📰🇨🇦 adding Toronto spice 🌶️🔥!
